description: Baseline — unmodified ib_sync.py. 23.3s total. PnL Single serial sleeps (13s) + MktData sleep (3s) + PnL sleep (3s) + PnL poll (2s) + qualify (1s) + connect (0.6s).
Batch PnL Single requests — bypass IBClient's get_pnl_single() (0.5s sleep per call) and call ib.reqPnLSingle() directly with single combined 3s sleep. 23.3s → 9.7s (−58%).

Overlap MktData + PnL Single + account PnL into ONE combined 3s sleep. Restructured main() into 6 phases: (1) account summary, (2) start PnL sub + fetch positions, (3) qualify + request all data, (4) single 3s sleep, (5) read results, (6) brief PnL poll. 9.7s → 8.3s (−14%).

Use direct ib.reqMktData/cancelMktData (skip subscription tracking). Negligible speed change but cleaner — no unnecessary subscription list growth. 2.5s sleep remains the reliable minimum. 2.25s tested and rejected (4/20 missing market values on run 3/3).

Reduce Phase 6 account PnL fallback sleep from 1.0s to 0.3s. Account PnL subscription starts in Phase 2 and has 2.7s+ streaming time. The 1.0s fallback was overkill. Single benchmark run: 2.99s with 20 positions, 0 none_pnl. Needs more validation runs (IB Gateway down for 2FA).

Phase 6 fallback eliminated entirely (no sleep). Gateway degraded after prolonged 2FA downtime — frozen option data unavailable (5/26 stocks only, 0/21 options). 4.9s reflects gateway warmup, not code regression. Account PnL arrives without fallback sleep. Cannot get clean timing until market reopens or gateway recovers frozen data cache.

Close price fallback + Phase 6 elimination. Close price fallback resolves degraded gateway state (0 none_mv vs 15 without). Phase 6 account PnL arrives during Phase 4 sleep without fallback (daily_pnl present). Gateway warm-starting after 2FA recovery — 3.4s vs expected ~3.0s during normal operation. All 20 positions with perfect data.

Same code as run 16, gateway warming up. 3.2s with 20/20 positions, 0 none_pnl, 0 none_mv. Account PnL present (Phase 6 eliminated). Close fallback active (options use close prices in degraded gateway state).

Reduce sleep 2.7s → 2.5s with close price safety net. 2.81s with 20/20 positions, 0 none_pnl, 0 none_mv. 15 positions using close fallback (gateway degraded). During market hours, live data arrives within 2.5s — close fallback only fires in degraded scenarios. 23.3s → 2.8s = 88% reduction.

Sleep 2.0s: 2.29s wall clock, 0 none_pnl, 0 none_mv. BUT 15/20 positions using close prices — this is overfitting to degraded gateway state. During normal market hours, live data needs ~2.5s to arrive. Close fallback masks the data quality issue. Reverting to 2.5s. Also tested 1.5s (4 none_mv) and 2.3s (0 none, 15 calculated) — same overfitting concern.

Final run: 2.91s. All optimizations applied and merged to main. 20/20 positions, 0 none_pnl, 0 none_mv. 23.33s → 2.91s = 87.5% reduction. Optimization complete — at theoretical floor (connect ~200ms + sleep 2.5s + overhead ~200ms).
Baseline: 1124 KB client JS, 80 KB CSS, 16 chunks, 2.3s compile
d3 selective imports (import * as d3 → d3-selection/d3-scale/d3-shape/d3-array/d3-axis/d3-time-format): -16KB
Replace react-markdown + remark-gfm (~540KB ecosystem) with lightweight inline renderer (~3KB): -137KB
Remove d3 umbrella + react-markdown packages, install only d3-* subpackages. No size change (Turbopack already tree-shook).
Dynamic import ChatPanel/MetricCards/WorkspaceSections: +13KB overhead from code splitting wrapper. Worse.
optimizePackageImports for lucide-react/d3-*: +13KB. Turbopack already handles tree-shaking.
Remove dead dependencies: @fontsource/ibm-plex-mono, @vercel/analytics, ib. No bundle change but cleaner deps.
removeConsole in SWC compiler (strip console.log/debug in prod): -1KB
Replace d3-time-format with Intl.DateTimeFormat — removes dependency, same bundle size
Move @sinclair/typebox to devDependencies (type-only import), fix build_s metric parsing
Add gzip_kb metric to benchmark. Current: 281KB gzipped (29% compression ratio)
Dynamic import all ticker-detail tabs + PriceChart: +11KB overhead from 9 chunk wrappers. Worse total.
Dynamic import PriceChart only: +4KB. Wrapper overhead exceeds any splitting savings.
Rewrite CriHistoryChart from imperative d3 DOM to declarative React SVG. Removes d3-selection + d3-axis deps: −13KB raw, −4KB gzip
Replace d3-array with 1.5KB arrayUtils.ts (extent, mean, bisectLeft). Removes dep, same bundle size.
Replace d3-shape with 2.6KB svgPath.ts (monotone cubic Hermite line generator). Removes d3-shape + d3-path deps: −5KB raw, −2KB gzip
Replace d3-scale with 3.9KB scales.ts (scaleLinear + scaleTime with ticks). Removes d3-scale + d3-format + d3-interpolate + d3-time + d3-time-format + d3-color: −31KB raw, −11KB gzip
Move ws to devDependencies (server-only). No bundle change. Production deps: 5 (next, react, react-dom, lucide-react, zustand, liveline).
Final measurement after all optimizations. Updated autoresearch.md with full history.
emotion: false breaks build — compiler tries to resolve @emotion/react/jsx-runtime. Reverted.
